title: cerastium radians
intro: Cerastium radians, also known as the moon daisy or frost flower, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Consuming Cerastium radians is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and acting as an antioxidant. Herbal preparations of Cerastium radians are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
